svg.text: ① Independent — assure1 assesses; it never builds or runs what it grades.
② Evidence-based — every finding is backed by reproducible proof; no pass without proof.
③ Standards-aligned — controls mapped to SOC2, GDPR/DPDP, HIPAA, SEBI/IRDAI/RBI, EU AI Act.
④ Continuous — monitoring + re-certification, not a point-in-time stamp.
⑤ Claude-native — model tiering + standards-as-configuration; observes, never alters.
⑥ The trust layer — validates every elan1 product, solution & build; pairs with run1 in production.
